mmr_coverage_county.long_name: County-Level MMR Vaccine Coverage Estimates for US Children
mmr_coverage_county.short_description: Estimated percentage of children with at least one dose of MMR vaccine at the county level
mmr_coverage_county.long_description: County-level estimates of MMR (measles, mumps, and rubella) vaccine coverage among US children, derived using small area estimation methods with post-stratification. These estimates integrate participatory surveillance data from digital health platforms with demographic and contextual covariates to provide granular geographic insights into vaccination coverage gaps. Each estimate includes posterior mean coverage percentage, risk classification, and spatial autocorrelation measures (Local Moran's I) to identify geographic clustering of under-vaccinated areas.
mmr_coverage_county.statement: In {location}, an estimated {value}% of children have received at least one dose of MMR vaccine

citations.title: Zhou EG, Brownstein J, Rader B. Assessing MMR Vaccination Coverage Gaps in US Children with Digital Participatory Surveillance. Nature Health. 2025.

mmr_coverage_zcta.long_name: ZIP Code-Level MMR Vaccine Coverage Estimates for US Children
mmr_coverage_zcta.short_description: Estimated percentage of children with at least one dose of MMR vaccine at the ZIP code (ZCTA) level
mmr_coverage_zcta.long_description: ZIP Code Tabulation Area (ZCTA) level estimates of MMR (measles, mumps, and rubella) vaccine coverage among US children, providing neighborhood-scale geographic resolution for identifying vaccination coverage gaps. These estimates are derived using small area estimation with post-stratification workflow, combining participatory surveillance data with demographic and contextual covariates. Each ZCTA estimate includes coverage percentage, risk classification, spatial clustering information, and participatory surveillance sample size. Uninhabited ZCTAs are excluded from the analysis.
mmr_coverage_zcta.statement: In {location}, an estimated {value}% of children have received at least one dose of MMR vaccine

citations.title: Zhou EG, Brownstein J, Rader B. Assessing MMR Vaccination Coverage Gaps in US Children with Digital Participatory Surveillance. Nature Health. 2025.

mmr_coverage_state.long_name: State-Level MMR Vaccine Coverage Estimates for US Children
mmr_coverage_state.short_description: Estimated percentage of children with at least one dose of MMR vaccine at the state level
mmr_coverage_state.long_description: State-level estimates of MMR (measles, mumps, and rubella) vaccine coverage among US children, aggregated from county-level estimates. These summaries provide a broader geographic perspective on vaccination coverage patterns across the United States, derived from small area estimation methods that integrate participatory surveillance data with demographic and contextual covariates.
mmr_coverage_state.statement: In {location}, an estimated {value}% of children have received at least one dose of MMR vaccine

citations.title: Zhou EG, Brownstein J, Rader B. Assessing MMR Vaccination Coverage Gaps in US Children with Digital Participatory Surveillance. Nature Health. 2025.
